segments.speaker: 题目6/7
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. Did you print a copy of your resume for the interview tomorrow? I didn't need to. I submitted it online. That was what they requested. OK. I had to bring several copies of mine when I applied for that internship, and I met with several people for the interview. What was the position again? In the accounting department. Maybe it's different in graphic design. I'm only meeting with one person. Oh, that sounds a lot less stressful.
